documents: AMAZON INDIA COMPLAINT REGISTRATION AND RETURN POLICY
Last Updated: May 2026

1. COMPLAINT REGISTRATION
When a customer reports an issue that cannot be resolved immediately (e.g., damaged items, lost packages, payment disputes), the customer support system registers a formal complaint.
- A unique support Ticket ID (format: TKT-XXXXXXXX) is generated automatically.
- High Priority: Assigned to urgent issues like payment failed but money deducted, delivery delays of more than 5 days, or account lockouts. High priority tickets require supervisor review and are resolved within 2-4 hours.
- Medium Priority: Assigned to return pick-up failures, Prime billing queries, or wrong item complaints. These are resolved within 24-48 hours.

2. RETURN WINDOWS AND REPLACEMENTS
Different product categories on Amazon India have specific return and replacement windows:
- Electronics & Mobiles: Most electronics, laptops, tablets, and smartphones have a 10-day return window. The policy is usually "Replacement Only". If the product is defective, a free replacement of the same model will be shipped. A refund is issued ONLY if the item is out of stock.
- Fashion & Clothing: Apparels, shoes, and fashion accessories have a 30-day return window. Customers can request a size exchange, replacement, or a full refund.
- Home & Kitchen Appliances: Have a 10-day return window. Eligible for free replacement if damaged in transit or defective.
- Non-Returnable Items: Grocery, beauty products, personal care appliances, and software are non-returnable. If damaged, a refund can be authorized by support agents on a case-by-case basis.

3. WRONG OR DAMAGED ITEM PROCESS
If a wrong product is delivered (e.g., received a phone cover instead of a phone) or the product is physically damaged:
- Take photos/videos of the package and item as proof.
- Do not throw away the original box or outer packaging.
- Register a complaint within 10 days of delivery.
- Amazon India will dispatch a return pickup agent. The pickup agent will verify the physical condition of the item and match the serial number/IMEI before accepting the return. Once picked up, a replacement or refund is triggered.
- For high-value electronics (above ₹20,000), support agents may require an internal investigation (takes 3-5 business days) before approving the refund or replacement.
AMAZON INDIA SHIPPING AND DELIVERY POLICY — OFFICIAL CUSTOMER SUPPORT REFERENCE
Last Updated: May 2026

1. DELIVERY SPEEDS AND SHIPPING FEES
Amazon India offers several shipping speeds. Eligible pin codes receive:
- One-Day Delivery: Free for Amazon Prime members. Non-Prime members pay ₹150 per order.
- Two-Day Delivery: Free for Amazon Prime members. Non-Prime members pay ₹120 per order.
- Same-Day Delivery: Free for Prime members in selected metro cities for orders above ₹499. For non-Prime members, Same-Day delivery costs ₹175.
- Standard Delivery: Delivers within 2-4 business days. Free for Prime members. Non-Prime members get free standard shipping on orders of ₹499 or more; otherwise, a flat ₹40 shipping fee applies.

2. LOGISTICS AND CARRIERS
Amazon India orders are primarily fulfilled via ATS (Amazon Transportation Services), our in-house courier partner. We also partner with premium third-party courier services such as Blue Dart, Delhivery, DTDC, and Ecom Express to ensure coverage across over 19,000 pin codes. The assigned courier and tracking number (e.g., ATS87564120, BD11993425) are shared via SMS and the Amazon.in order tracking dashboard immediately upon package dispatch.

3. LOGISTICAL AND DELIVERY DELAYS
Occasionally, shipments may experience delays due to unforeseen logistics issues, extreme weather conditions, or local disruptions. In such cases, the expected delivery date will automatically update on the customer's portal. If a package does not arrive by the revised expected date, customers are advised to wait for 24-48 hours. If the delay exceeds 3 business days beyond the original window, customers can request supervisor escalation or initiate a refund.

4. DELIVERED BUT NOT RECEIVED ISSUES
If an order's status is marked as "Delivered" on the tracking portal but the customer has not received the package:
- Check with family members, security personnel at the apartment gate, or neighbors who might have accepted the delivery.
- Verify if a secure drop-off photo was uploaded by the ATS delivery agent.
- Allow 24 hours as couriers sometimes scan packages as delivered prematurely.
- If the package is still missing after 24 hours, the customer must report it to Amazon support within 30 days of the marked delivery date to qualify for a free replacement or refund.

5. PACKAGE DAMAGED IN TRANSIT
If a shipment is visibly damaged upon delivery, customers can refuse to accept it. The ATS delivery agent will return the package to the fulfillment center, and a replacement or full refund will be processed automatically. If the damage is discovered after opening the box, please refer to the Amazon India return window and file a complaint within 10 days of delivery.
AMAZON INDIA FAQ & SUPPORT PROCEDURES — OFFICIAL REFERENCE
Last Updated: May 2026

1. AMAZON PRIME MEMBERSHIP
Amazon Prime is a premium subscription program offering benefits to customers in India:
- Free delivery: Free One-Day, Two-Day, and Standard Delivery on eligible items. No minimum order value required.
- Prime Video & Prime Music: Unlimited ad-free music streaming and access to exclusive movies, TV shows, and Amazon Originals.
- Prime Reading: Free access to a curated selection of eBooks.
- Early Access: 24-hour early access to major sale events like Prime Day, Great Indian Festival, and Lightning Deals.
- Prime Pricing: Subscription costs ₹1,499 for 1 year, ₹599 for 3 months, or ₹299 for 1 month.

2. PAYMENT FAILURES AND DOUBLE CHARGES
If money is deducted from your bank account but the order is not placed (marked as "Payment Failed"):
- Do not panic. The money is held in a bank transit pool and is completely safe.
- UPI / Net Banking: Refund is initiated automatically and will revert to the original bank account within 3 to 5 business days.
- Credit / Debit Card: Reversal occurs automatically within 5 to 7 business days.
- Customers can check the refund status directly in the Amazon Pay dashboard under "Transactions". If the reversal is delayed, customer support can issue a Bank Reference Number (ARN/RRN) to trace the transaction with your bank.

3. TAX INVOICE AND WARRANTY CLAIMS
To claim warranty on any product purchased from Amazon India:
- Go to "Your Orders" on the Amazon app/website.
- Locate the specific product and click on "Download Invoice". Select "Tax Invoice" to download the PDF.
- Print the tax invoice and take it along with the product to any brand-authorized service center. The invoice serves as official proof of purchase and warranty start date.
- Note: Amazon India does not directly issue warranty cards. The invoice is sufficient for brand service centers across India.
AMAZON INDIA PAYMENT POLICY — OFFICIAL REFERENCE
Last Updated: May 2026

1. ACCEPTED PAYMENT METHODS
Amazon India offers multiple convenient payment options during checkout:
- Amazon Pay UPI: Customers can link their bank account and pay instantly using a UPI PIN. No transactional charges apply.
- Credit / Debit Cards: We accept Visa, Mastercard, RuPay, and American Express.
- Net Banking: Supported for all major banks in India.
- Cash on Delivery (COD): Available for order values up to ₹49,999. A convenience fee of ₹40 may apply for COD orders below ₹499. Payment can be made in cash, or digitally via UPI scan-and-pay at the door.
- Amazon Pay Balance: Pre-loaded money in the digital wallet. Quickest checkout method.

2. EQUATED MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS (EMI)
For high-value purchases, Amazon India offers No Cost EMI and standard EMI options:
- No Cost EMI: Available on selected credit cards, Amazon Pay Late, and select debit cards. The interest charged by the bank is given as an upfront discount, making the effective interest rate 0%.
- Standard EMI: Available for periods of 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, and 24 months, with interest rates varying from 13% to 16% per annum depending on the bank.
- Cancellation and EMI Refund: If an order placed on EMI is cancelled or returned, the purchase amount is refunded to the card. However, processing fees charged by the bank during the transaction (usually ₹199 + GST) are non-refundable.

3. UPI DISPUTES AND REFUNDS
In case of a failed payment where the bank reports a successful transaction but Amazon shows a failure:
- The payment status is updated automatically within 24 hours.
- If not updated, the transaction is marked as a dispute. A refund is processed back to the original bank account within 2-4 business days.
- If a customer disputes a transaction, they should share their UPI Transaction ID (starts with 3 or 4 and is 12 digits long) with Amazon support for tracking.
AMAZON INDIA REFUND POLICY — OFFICIAL CUSTOMER SUPPORT REFERENCE
Last Updated: May 2026

1. REFUND TIMELINES AND METHODS
Once a returned item is received at the Amazon India fulfillment center, a quality check is performed within 24-48 hours. After successful quality inspection, the refund is issued to the customer's selected payment method. The refund credit timelines are:
- Amazon Pay Balance: Processed within 2 hours of inspection approval.
- Amazon Pay UPI / Linked Bank Account: Processed within 2 to 4 business days.
- Net Banking: Processed within 2 to 4 business days.
- Credit Card / Debit Card: Processed within 3 to 5 business days, depending on the issuing bank.
- Cash on Delivery (COD): Refund is credited to the customer's bank account via NEFT (takes 2-4 business days once bank details are updated) or directly as Amazon Pay Balance (takes 2 hours).

2. REFUND OF SHIPPING FEES
If the return is due to an Amazon India error (e.g., wrong item received, defective product, damaged in transit), the entire shipping fee (if any) paid during purchase will be fully refunded. If the return is voluntary (e.g., customer changed mind, size did not fit but product matches description), the original shipping fee of ₹40 is not refundable, and a return pick-up fee may be deducted depending on the product category.

3. AMAZON A-TO-Z GUARANTEE
For purchases made from third-party sellers on the Amazon India Marketplace, customers are protected by the Amazon A-to-z Guarantee. This guarantee covers:
- Orders that are delayed by more than 3 days after the maximum estimated delivery date.
- Items received that are damaged, defective, or materially different from what was described.
- Cases where the seller fails to issue a refund despite receiving the return.
A-to-z Guarantee claims can be submitted up to 90 days after the estimated delivery date, and the maximum claim value is ₹2,500.

4. REFUND STATUS AND FAQS
Customers can check their refund status under "Your Orders" -> "View Return/Refund Status". If a refund is marked as "Refunded" in the Amazon portal but has not reflected in the bank statement, customers should wait for the maximum business day limit of their payment method (up to 5 days for cards) and contact their bank with the refund RRN (Retrieval Reference Number) provided by Amazon support.
AMAZON INDIA PRODUCT WARRANTY POLICY
Last Updated: May 2026

1. BRAND WARRANTY VS SELLER WARRANTY
Most branded products sold on Amazon India (electronics, home appliances, mobile phones) come with a manufacturer or brand warranty:
- Brand Warranty: The warranty is provided and fulfilled directly by the brand (e.g., Samsung, Apple, HP, Sony). The warranty duration is typically 1 year from the date of purchase. For any defects, the customer must contact the brand's authorized service network.
- Seller Warranty: For certain imported, unbranded, or refurbished items, the warranty is provided by the seller. The seller's contact details are listed on the product detail page and invoice. For refurbished items, Amazon Renewed offers a 6-month seller warranty.

2. CLAIMING WARRANTY
To claim warranty on a product purchased from Amazon India, follow these steps:
- Step 1: Download the PDF tax invoice from "Your Orders" -> "Download Invoice" -> "Tax Invoice".
- Step 2: Take a printout of the tax invoice.
- Step 3: Visit the nearest authorized service center of the brand. The tax invoice contains the purchase date and the unique serial number or IMEI of the device (if applicable), which acts as official warranty proof.
- Note: Customers do not need physical warranty cards stamped by the seller. The tax invoice is legally recognized across India as proof of warranty.

3. AMAZON EXTENDED WARRANTY AND PROTECTION PLANS
Amazon India offers optional extended warranty and protection plans (partnered with Acko or OneAssist) for mobiles, laptops, and appliances:
- The plan must be purchased on the same day as the product.
- It covers accidental screen damage, liquid damage, and mechanical breakdowns beyond the brand's 1-year warranty period.
- Claims can be filed directly on the partner portal (Acko/OneAssist) using the plan ID received via email. Amazon support can assist in retrieving plan IDs or routing calls to the partner helpdesk.
